data.title: Trump's Tariff Pause Saves Market From 'Edge Of The Cliff,' Dan Ives Says 'Biggest Wild Card' Still Remains
data.description: Wedbush's Dan Ives believes the 90-day tariff pause was exactly what the stock market was waiting for. Despite the strong rally in markets, the analyst cautioned that a "key obstacle" is still on the table.

data.title: Raisin Bran Maker Post Holdings To Shut 2 Cereal Plants As Demand Falls, Cuts 300 Jobs
data.description: Post Holdings Inc. (NYSE: POST) plans to close two cereal manufacturing plants in Ontario and Nevada by late 2025. The move comes as the company aims to cut costs amid weakening demand for ready-to-eat cereals. Production will shift to other sites, helping Post streamline operations and reduce excess capacity in its network.

data.title: Redwire Joins ispace Tech In Pursuit Of NASA's $2.6 Billion Lunar Economy Mission
data.description: Redwire Corp. (RDW) shares up premarket after signing MOU with ispace-U.S. for commercial lunar missions. RDW is one of 14 prime contractors.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Explode Higher As Trump Hits Pause On Reciprocal Tariffs
data.description: The crypto market is surging after President Trump announced a pause on his planned reciprocal tariffs, easing macroeconomic tension and triggering a sharp risk-on rally across digital assets.

data.title: Exclusive: From Corn To Crypto - Teucrium CEO Talks Strategy, Risk And Launch Of XXRP
data.description: Teucrium introduces XXRP, a leveraged ETF that offers 2x daily returns on XRP. Aimed at short-term traders with high conviction views on XRP price direction, it provides regulated access to the cryptocurrency market without direct ownership.
